requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Niger has no mature public four-wheel EV charging network confirmed from official sources, so connector requirements are likely to be set by project owners, imported vehicle fleets, donor procurement, or utility specifications rather than a detailed public EVSE rule. Because Niger is Francophone and generally IEC-aligned for electrical equipment, IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC should be treated as the expected international connector direction for interoperable four-wheel EV charging. For smaller two- and three-wheeler charging, project specifications may instead define lower-power AC outlets, battery-swap hardware, or proprietary fleet connectors.
summary.zh: 未能从官方来源确认尼日尔已形成成熟的四轮车公共电动汽车充电网络，因此接口要求很可能由项目业主、进口车辆车队、捐助方采购或公用事业规范决定，而非由详细公开EVSE规则统一规定。由于尼日尔为法语国家且电气设备通常按IEC体系对接，面向四轮车互操作充电时，应将交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2视为预期的国际接口方向。对于两/三轮车小功率充电，项目规格可能改为规定低功率交流插座、换电硬件或专有车队接口。
summary.zht: 未能從官方來源確認尼日已形成成熟的四輪車公共電動汽車充電網絡，因此接口要求很可能由項目業主、進口車輛車隊、捐助方採購或公用事業規範決定，而非由詳細公開EVSE規則統一規定。由於尼日為法語國家且電氣設備通常按IEC體系對接，面向四輪車互操作充電時，應將交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2視為預期的國際接口方向。對於兩/三輪車小功率充電，項目規格可能改為規定低功率交流插座、換電硬體或專有車隊接口。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project-owner, fleet, donor, ARSE, or NIGELEC specifications where applicable

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC couplers and IEC 62196 Type 2 differ in connector gender, contact arrangement, and signaling; GB/T DC couplers are physically different from CCS2 and use a China-specific CAN communication stack. A China GB/T-only charger is therefore physically and electrically incompatible with the IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 direction expected for internationally interoperable deployments in Niger.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并使用GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交流耦合器与IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性别、触点排列和信号方式上不同；GB/T直流耦合器与CCS2物理形状不同，并使用中国特定CAN通信栈。因此，仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩与尼日尔国际互操作部署预期的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向在物理和电气上不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並使用GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交流耦合器與IEC 62196 Type 2在接口性別、觸點排列和信號方式上不同；GB/T直流耦合器與CCS2物理形狀不同，並使用中國特定CAN通訊棧。因此，僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁與尼日國際互操作部署預期的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2方向在物理和電氣上不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system

gap.en: GB/T-connector chargers need hardware change to IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 where Niger projects specify international four-wheel EV interoperability. The redesign should cover the coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity pilot, control pilot, temperature rise, labels, spare parts, and the DC communication stack. Adapters should not be treated as a compliance solution. For two- and three-wheeler projects, confirm the vehicle battery voltage, charging inlet, swappable-battery interface, and local service model before selecting hardware.
gap.zh: 当尼日尔项目要求四轮车国际互操作时，GB/T接口充电桩需要硬件改为IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2。重新设计应覆盖耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近导引、控制导引、温升、标签、备件和直流通信栈。不应将转接器视为合规解决方案。对于两/三轮车项目，应在选型前确认车辆电池电压、充电接口、换电接口和本地服务模式。
gap.zht: 當尼日項目要求四輪車國際互操作時，GB/T接口充電樁需要硬體改為IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2。重新設計應覆蓋耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近導引、控制導引、溫升、標籤、備件和直流通訊棧。不應將轉接器視為合規解決方案。對於兩/三輪車項目，應在選型前確認車輛電池電壓、充電接口、換電接口和本地服務模式。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but physically decisive — IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 becomes mandatory where written into project, fleet, NIGELEC, ARSE, donor, or operator specifications; GB/T is not physically interchangeable
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion for Niger-facing four-wheel EV charging is a hardware and protocol redesign, not paperwork. Confirm whether the project requires IEC 62196 Type 2, CCS2, or a two/three-wheeler charging interface before quoting or shipping. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向尼日尔四轮车充电的接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。在报价或发货前，应确认项目要求IEC 62196 Type 2、CCS2，还是两/三轮车充电接口。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向尼日四輪車充電的接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。在報價或發貨前，應確認項目要求IEC 62196 Type 2、CCS2，還是兩/三輪車充電接口。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。
